# Products Parameter Integrity Improvement Track

This track keeps the missing-parameter audit and source-recovery workspace in
the same portfolio as repo quality, UI, and performance improvements.

## Key Entry Points

- [`scan-latest.md`](./scan-latest.md)
- [`scan-latest.json`](./scan-latest.json)
- [`inventory-latest.csv`](./inventory-latest.csv)

## Core Commands

- `npm run improvements:audit -- --track products-parameter-integrity`
- `npm run improvements:classify -- --track products-parameter-integrity`
- `npm run improvements:plan -- --track products-parameter-integrity`
